The '''Capacitor''' was a floating installation in use by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] situated among a hidden base inside a [[Volcano/Legends|volcano]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]]. The Capacitor fed on geothermal energy transmitted to it by a dozen [[Transmitter/Legends|transmitters]] installed into the volcano floor, which produced a [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] around it. During the [[Raid on Sullust]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Squadron/Legends|flight group]] [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] disabled the shield by destroying all the transmitters, and caused the Capacitor to implode by destroying support columns around the core.

==Behind the scenes==
The Capacitor appears in the [[1998]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']].
